title: agent-2fa — Challenge
description: Schema for a Challenge envelope sent from an Agent to one or more Authorizer Devices, per agent-2fa protocol v0.1 §6.

challenge_id.description: Agent-assigned identifier, prefixed 'chg-' followed by 6-32 lowercase hex chars. Globally unique per (Agent, requested_at).

command.description: Textual command form of the Action (e.g. 'rm -rf /var/cache'). Mutually exclusive with 'tool'.

tool.description: Structured tool identifier (e.g. 'filesystem.delete'). Mutually exclusive with 'command'.

args.description: Arguments passed to the structured tool. Schema is tool-specific; envelope does not constrain.

redacted_fields.description: Field names within 'args' (or 'command' tokens) whose values MUST be omitted from human display.

signature.description: ed25519 signature by agent_pubkey over the canonical Challenge minus the 'signature' field.
